reviews.comment:
Mucha predisposicion en general. Lastima las malas caras de los propietarios de la consecion (Lo averigue en el ACA de MdP de donde depende, para quejarme), un matrimonio que de todos desconfian y nunca una sonrisa. Pareciera que el turista molestara. Y LO PEOR QUE MANTIENEN UNA EMPLEADA QUE LLEGA A CARAJEAR AL PUBLICO POR LOJICOS RECLAMOS DE DEMORAS EN EL SERVICIO DE CAFETERIA.

(Translated by Google)
Overall, they were very helpful. It's a shame about the bad attitude of the concession owners (I checked with the ACA in Mar del Plata, where it's under their jurisdiction, so I could complain). They're a couple who seem suspicious of everyone and never smile. It's as if tourists are a nuisance. And the worst part is that they keep an employee who even yells at customers for making perfectly reasonable complaints about delays in the cafeteria service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRcDUtX1ZBEAE

Muy buena atención, como la mayoría de las estaciones del ACA.
Normalmente en temporada o fines de semana largos, hay que esperar haciendo fila, ya que hay mucha demanda.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, like most ACA stations.
Normally during peak season or long weekends, you have to wait in line due to high demand.
